$comment: Layer C for INVOICE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. This module has NO PERFORM: control falls through MAIN-PARA -> CALC-PARA -> PRINT-PARA, and the zero-amount validation STOP RUN inside MAIN's IF ends the program early. Layer C executes the full top-level paragraph chain and honors STOP RUN as a path terminator, so it enumerates exactly two paths (early-exit and billed), verifies the WS-AMOUNT = 0 branch boundary, and solves the fee's rounding half-cent boundary on the billed path.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 INVOICE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-invoice)
